tagline: New maintenance updates are available for supported Databricks Runtime versions.
what_it_does: New maintenance updates are available for supported Databricks Runtime versions. These updates include bug fixes, security patches, and performance improvements. For details, see Databricks Runtime maintenance updates.
why_it_matters: These updates include bug fixes, security patches, and performance improvements.
key_takeaway: New maintenance updates are available for supported Databricks Runtime versions.
